description_long: This is a pair of sporty, rectangular sunglasses with a robust, full-rim frame. The frame is thick and angular, providing a modern and athletic appearance, and is primarily a light color with a smooth finish. The lenses are large, slightly curved, and have a warm, orange-tinted reflective coating that offers both style and sun protection. The temples are straight and wide, with a subtle taper towards the ear tips and a small, rectangular accent near the hinges. The interior of the temples features a contrasting color, adding a touch of visual interest. A small, gold-colored brand logo is visible on the outer side of each temple, enhancing the premium look.
description: Sporty, rectangular sunglasses with thick, light-colored frames and orange-tinted reflective lenses. Features wide temples with a gold logo accent and contrasting interior color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim frame, and large orange-tinted lenses.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick temple, gold logo accent, and contrasting interior color.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the frame, the full length of the temples, and the interior color detail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the gold logo and the temple's shape and thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, angular geometry and a robust, sporty style. The temples are wide and straight, tapering slightly towards the ends, and the overall design is modern and athletic.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses have a warm orange tint with a reflective, mirrored finish. The tint is uniform across the lens surface and provides a bold, stylish look.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a solid, integrated type with a gentle curve, connecting the two lenses seamlessly without separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick and straight with a small, rectangular gold accent near the hinges and a contrasting color on the interior side. The design is clean and minimalistic, emphasizing function and style.
attribute_brand_logo: A gold-colored brand logo is visible on the outer side of each temple, printed or embossed in a small rectangular area near the hinge.
